title: armeria elongata var. alpina
intro: Armeria elongata var. alpina, also known as Alpine Sea Thrift, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Armeria elongata var. alpina include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
